failures.description: The ProductCatalogSearch call was ill-formed: it omitted the required item_id and supplied product_id as integer 0 instead of a string.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The agent attempted a concrete tool call with payload {"product_id": 0}. The tool/runtime explicitly rejected it with a SchemaError saying catalog.get_details requires string product_id and item_id. This is a malformed invocation: product_id has the wrong type/value and item_id is missing. The failure is not a connectivity, access, or guardrail issue.
